locations: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

flavorText.firered: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this POKéMON is born. The seed slowly grows larger.
flavorText.leafgreen: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.description: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: There is a plant bulb on its back. When it absorbs nutrients, the bulb is said to blossom into a large flower.
flavorText.leafgreen: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.description: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.description: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

flavorText.firered: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.
flavorText.leafgreen: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: It lashes about with its tail to knock down its foe. It then tears up the fallen opponent with sharp claws.
flavorText.leafgreen: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the air temperature to unbearably high levels.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: Its wings can carry this POKéMON close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.
flavorText.leafgreen: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

flavorText.firered: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.
flavorText.leafgreen: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON is very popular as a pet. Its fur-covered tail is a symbol of its longevity.
flavorText.leafgreen: It often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For fast swimming, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.
flavorText.leafgreen: The pressurized water jets on this brutal POKéMON’s shell are used for high- speed tackles.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: It is covered with a green skin. When it grows, it sheds the skin, covers itself with silk, and becomes a cocoon.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

flavorText.firered: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.
flavorText.leafgreen: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

flavorText.firered: The wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this POKéMON can fly about even in rain.
flavorText.leafgreen: In battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

flavorText.firered: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.
flavorText.leafgreen: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp stinger on its head that injects poison.

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON is in a temporary stage while making its body. It is almost completely unable to move on its own.
flavorText.leafgreen: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.

flavorText.firered: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.
flavorText.leafgreen: It flies at high speed and attacks using the large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: Does not like to fight. It hides in tall grass and so on, foraging for food such as small bugs.
flavorText.leafgreen: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

flavorText.firered: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as an EXEGGCUTE to its nest over 60 miles away.
flavorText.leafgreen: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.

flavorText.firered: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.
flavorText.leafgreen: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.

flavorText.firered: Its fangs are long and very sharp. They grow continuously, so it gnaws on hard things to whittle them down.
flavorText.leafgreen: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

flavorText.firered: Its rear feet have three toes each. They are webbed, enabling it to swim across rivers.
flavorText.leafgreen: It uses its whiskers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

flavorText.firered: It busily flits around here and there. Even if it is frail, it can be a tough foe that uses MIRROR MOVE.
flavorText.leafgreen: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

flavorText.firered: Its huge and magnificent wings can keep it aloft in the sky. It can remain flying a whole day without landing.
flavorText.leafgreen: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

flavorText.firered: A very common sight in grassland, etc. It flicks its tongue in and out to sense danger in its surroundings.
flavorText.leafgreen: Moving silently and stealthily, it eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.

flavorText.firered: The pattern on its belly appears to be a frightening face. Weak foes will flee just at the sight of the pattern.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

flavorText.firered: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.
flavorText.leafgreen: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

flavorText.firered: Its electric charges can reach even 100,000 volts. Careless contact can cause even an Indian elephant to faint.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

flavorText.firered: It burrows and lives underground. If threatened, it curls itself up into a ball for protection.
flavorText.leafgreen: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for prey.

flavorText.firered: It is adept at attacking with the spines on its back and its sharp claws while quickly scurrying about.
flavorText.leafgreen: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

encounters.notes: Trade a Nidoran♂ to NPC in Underground Path entrance (LeafGreen)

flavorText.firered: Though small, it must be treated with caution because of its powerfully toxic barbs. The female has smaller horns.
flavorText.leafgreen: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

encounters.notes: Trade a Nidorino to NPC on Route 11 (LeafGreen)

flavorText.firered: The female has a gentle temperament. It emits ultrasonic cries that have the power to befuddle foes.
flavorText.leafgreen: The female’s horns develop slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

flavorText.firered: The body is covered by stiff, needle- like scales. If it becomes excited, the needles bristle outwards.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

encounters.notes: Trade a Nidoran♀ to NPC in Underground Path entrance (FireRed)

flavorText.firered: Its large ears are flapped like wings when it is listening to distant sounds. It extends toxic barbs when angered.
flavorText.leafgreen: It stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

encounters.notes: Trade a Nidorina to NPC on Route 11 (FireRed)

flavorText.firered: It is easily angered. By swinging its well- developed horn wildly, it can even punch through diamond.
flavorText.leafgreen: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

flavorText.firered: It is recognized by its rock-hard hide and its extended horn. Be careful with the horn as it contains venom.
flavorText.leafgreen: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey’s bones.

abilities.name: Rivalry
abilities.description: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

flavorText.firered: Its adorable appearance makes it popular as a pet. However, it is rare and difficult to find.
flavorText.leafgreen: With its magical and cute appeal, it has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

abilities.name: Magic Guard
abilities.description: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

flavorText.firered: It has an acute sense of hearing. It can easily hear a pin being dropped nearly 1,100 yards away.
flavorText.leafgreen: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

abilities.name: Magic Guard
abilities.description: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

flavorText.firered: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.
flavorText.leafgreen: When it is born, it has just one snow- white tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: It has nine long tails and fur that gleams gold. It is said to live for 1,000 years.
flavorText.leafgreen: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.
flavorText.leafgreen: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

abilities.name: Competitive
abilities.description: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

flavorText.firered: Its fur is extremely fine, dense, and supple. The exquisitely pleasant fur conveys an image of luxury.
flavorText.leafgreen: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

abilities.name: Competitive
abilities.description: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

flavorText.firered: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echo location to flit about in darkness.
flavorText.leafgreen: It forms colonies in perpetually dark places and uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.

flavorText.firered: It clamps down on its prey with needle- sharp fangs and drains over 10 ounces of blood in one gulp.
flavorText.leafgreen: Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

flavorText.firered: Its scientific name is “Oddium Wanderus.” At night, it is said to walk nearly 1,000 feet on its two roots.
flavorText.leafgreen: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

flavorText.firered: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.
flavorText.leafgreen: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn’t drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

flavorText.firered: Its petals are the largest in the world. It fiendishly scatters allergy-causing pollen from its petals.
flavorText.leafgreen: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

flavorText.firered: Growing out of the bug’s back are mushrooms called tochukaso. The mushrooms grow with the bug host.
flavorText.leafgreen: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by drawing nutrients from the bug host.

abilities.name: Dry Skin
abilities.description: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

flavorText.firered: It scatters toxic spores from the mushroom cap. In China, the spores are used as herbal medicine.
flavorText.leafgreen: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.

abilities.name: Dry Skin
abilities.description: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

flavorText.firered: Its eyes act as radar, enabling it to be active in darkness. The eyes can also shoot powerful beams.
flavorText.leafgreen: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats bugs. It is attracted by light at night.

abilities.name: Tinted Lens
abilities.description: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

flavorText.firered: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.
flavorText.leafgreen: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

abilities.name: Tinted Lens
abilities.description: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.

flavorText.firered: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.
flavorText.leafgreen: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

flavorText.firered: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.
flavorText.leafgreen: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

flavorText.firered: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.
flavorText.leafgreen: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

flavorText.firered: Has a vicious temperament. Beware if it raises its tail straight up. It is a signal that it is about to pounce and bite.
flavorText.leafgreen: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

flavorText.firered: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.
flavorText.leafgreen: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.

flavorText.firered: The forelegs are webbed, helping to make it an adept swimmer. It can be seen swimming elegantly in lakes, etc.
flavorText.leafgreen: Often seen swimming elegantly by lakeshores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster Kappa.

flavorText.firered: Light and agile on its feet, and ferocious in temperament. When angered, it flies into an uncontrollable frenzy.
flavorText.leafgreen: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

abilities.name: Anger Point
abilities.description: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

flavorText.firered: It is always outrageously furious. If it gives chase, it will tenaciously track the target no matter how far.
flavorText.leafgreen: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it catches up.

abilities.name: Anger Point
abilities.description: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

flavorText.firered: Very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: A POKéMON that is described in Chinese legends. It is said to race at an unbelievable speed.
flavorText.leafgreen: A POKéMON that has long been admired for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: Its slick black skin is thin and damp. A part of its internal organs can be seen through the skin as a spiral pattern.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its newly grown legs prevent it from walking well. It appears to prefer swimming over walking.

flavorText.firered: Its two legs are well developed. Even though it can live on the ground, it prefers living in water.
flavorText.leafgreen: It can live in or out of water. When out of water, it constantly sweats to keep its body slimy.

flavorText.firered: An adept swimmer, it knows the front crawl, butterfly, and more. It is faster than the best human swimmers.
flavorText.leafgreen: A swimmer adept at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

flavorText.firered: It sleeps for 18 hours a day. It uses a variety of extrasensory powers even while asleep.
flavorText.leafgreen: Using its ability to read minds, it will sense impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.

flavorText.firered: It happened one morning - a boy with extrasensory powers awoke in bed transformed into KADABRA.
flavorText.leafgreen: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close.

flavorText.firered: It does not like physical attacks very much. Instead, it freely uses extra­ sensory powers to defeat foes.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its IQ (intelligence quotient) is said to be around 5,000.

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

flavorText.firered: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.
flavorText.leafgreen: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

abilities.name: No Guard
abilities.description: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

flavorText.firered: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

abilities.name: No Guard
abilities.description: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

flavorText.firered: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its superpowerful punches are said to knock the victim flying clear over the horizon.

abilities.name: No Guard
abilities.description: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

flavorText.firered: Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.
flavorText.leafgreen: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It appears to use its root feet to replenish moisture.

flavorText.firered: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.
flavorText.leafgreen: It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.

flavorText.firered: Lures prey into its mouth with a honeylike aroma. The helpless prey is melted with a dissolving fluid.
flavorText.leafgreen: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

flavorText.firered: Its eyes are as transparent as crystals. From them, it shoots mysterious beams of light.
flavorText.leafgreen: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by their stingers.

flavorText.firered: It has 80 tentacles that move about freely. They can sting, causing poisoning and sharp, stabbing pain.
flavorText.leafgreen: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket
Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

flavorText.firered: Its round form makes it easy to pick up. Some people have used them to hurl at each other in a snowball fight.
flavorText.leafgreen: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

flavorText.firered: Be careful while hiking on mountain trails. GRAVELER may come rolling down the path without slowing.
flavorText.leafgreen: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

flavorText.firered: It is enclosed in a hard shell that is as rugged as slabs of rock. It sheds skin once a year to grow larger.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without taking damage.

flavorText.firered: Its body is light, and its legs are incredibly powerful. It can clear Ayers Rock in one leap.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its hooves are ten times harder than diamond. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: It can gallop at a top speed of 150 miles per hour. It can race as fast as a bullet train while ablaze.
flavorText.leafgreen: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.
flavorText.leafgreen: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

flavorText.firered: When a SLOWPOKE went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a SHELLDER. That made it evolve into SLOWBRO.
flavorText.leafgreen: The SHELLDER that latches onto SLOWPOKE’s tail is said to feed on the host’s leftover scraps.

flavorText.firered: It moves while constantly hovering. It discharges THUNDER WAVE and so on from the units at its sides.
flavorText.leafgreen: Uses antigravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.

flavorText.firered: A linked cluster formed of several MAGNEMITE. It discharges powerful magnetic waves at high voltage.
flavorText.leafgreen: Formed by several MAGNEMITE linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

encounters.notes: Trade a Spearow to NPC in Vermilion City house

flavorText.firered: It always walks about with a plant stalk clamped in its beak. The stalk is used for building its nest.
flavorText.leafgreen: The plant stalk it holds is its weapon. The stalk is used like a sword to cut all sorts of things.

flavorText.firered: A two-headed POKéMON that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.
flavorText.leafgreen: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

flavorText.firered: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.
flavorText.leafgreen: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head is said to stay awake.

encounters.notes: Trade a Ponyta to scientist in Cinnabar Lab

flavorText.firered: Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit.
flavorText.leafgreen: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick icebergs.

abilities.name: Hydration
abilities.description: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

flavorText.firered: Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.
flavorText.leafgreen: It stores thermal energy in the body. It swims at a steady eight knots even in intensely cold waters.

abilities.name: Hydration
abilities.description: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

flavorText.firered: Sludge exposed to X rays from the moon transformed into GRIMER. It loves feeding on filthy things.
flavorText.leafgreen: Appears in filthy areas. It thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

flavorText.firered: It is usually undetectable because it blends in with the ground. Touching it can cause terrible poisoning.
flavorText.leafgreen: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

flavorText.firered: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

abilities.name: Skill Link
abilities.description: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.

flavorText.firered: Its shell is extremely hard. It cannot be shattered, even with a bomb. The shell opens only when it is attacking.
flavorText.leafgreen: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

abilities.name: Skill Link
abilities.description: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.

flavorText.firered: A being that exists as a thin gas. It can topple an Indian elephant by enveloping the prey in two seconds.
flavorText.leafgreen: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

flavorText.firered: If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, HAUNTER is there.
flavorText.leafgreen: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

flavorText.firered: It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.
flavorText.leafgreen: On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be GENGAR’s doing.

abilities.name: Cursed Body
abilities.description: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.

flavorText.firered: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.
flavorText.leafgreen: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to black-colored diamonds.

flavorText.firered: A descendent of the legendary animal baku, which is said to eat dreams. It is skilled at hypnotism.
flavorText.leafgreen: Puts enemies to sleep, then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating only bad dreams.

abilities.name: Forewarn
abilities.description: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

flavorText.firered: It carries a pendulum-like device. There once was an incident in which it took away a child it hypnotized.
flavorText.leafgreen: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.

abilities.name: Forewarn
abilities.description: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

flavorText.firered: It can be found near the sea. The large pincers grow back if they are torn out of their sockets.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

flavorText.firered: Its large and hard pincer has 10,000- horsepower strength. However, being so big, it is unwieldy to move.
flavorText.leafgreen: The large pincer has 10,000-horsepower crushing force. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.

flavorText.firered: A life-form whose identity is unknown. It is said to SCREECH or suddenly SELFDESTRUCT.
flavorText.leafgreen: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, it has zapped many people.

encounters.notes: Trade a Raichu to scientist in Cinnabar Lab

flavorText.firered: It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of “The Bomb Ball.”
flavorText.leafgreen: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

flavorText.firered: Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life- form more like plant seeds.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

flavorText.firered: It is called “The Walking Tropical Rainforest.” Each of the nuts has a face and a will of its own.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is said that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.

flavorText.firered: It wears the skull of its dead mother on its head. When it becomes lonesome, it is said to cry loudly.
flavorText.leafgreen: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON’s real face.

flavorText.firered: It is small and was originally very weak. Its temperament turned ferocious when it began using bones.
flavorText.leafgreen: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

encounters.notes: Choose Hitmonlee from Karate Master in Fighting Dojo (exclusive vs. Hitmonchan)

flavorText.firered: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.
flavorText.leafgreen: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra-long, loping strides.

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.description: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.

encounters.notes: Choose Hitmonchan from Karate Master in Fighting Dojo (exclusive vs. Hitmonlee)

flavorText.firered: The spirit of a pro boxer has infused this POKéMON. It throws punches that are faster than a bullet train.
flavorText.leafgreen: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning-fast volleys that are impossible to see.

abilities.name: Iron Fist
abilities.description: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.

encounters.notes: Trade a Golduck to NPC in Route 18 gate (FireRed)
Trade a Slowbro to NPC in Route 18 gate (LeafGreen)

flavorText.firered: Its tongue is twice the length of its body. It can be moved like an arm for grabbing food and attacking.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon’s. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

flavorText.firered: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.
flavorText.leafgreen: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

abilities.name: Neutralizing Gas
abilities.description: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.

flavorText.firered: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small KOFFING twins becoming conjoined as a WEEZING.
flavorText.leafgreen: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, two KOFFING can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

abilities.name: Neutralizing Gas
abilities.description: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.

flavorText.firered: Strong, but not too bright, this POKéMON can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging TACKLES.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its massive bones are 1,000 times harder than human bones. Its TACKLE can knock a semitrailer flying.

flavorText.firered: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.
flavorText.leafgreen: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

flavorText.firered: It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.
flavorText.leafgreen: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to catch one.

encounters.notes: Trade a Venonat to scientist in Cinnabar Lab

flavorText.firered: Blue plant vines cloak the POKéMON’s identity in a tangled mass. It entangles anything that gets close.
flavorText.leafgreen: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. The vines sway as it walks.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.description: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

flavorText.firered: The female raises its offspring in a pouch on its belly. It is skilled at attacking using COMET PUNCH.
flavorText.leafgreen: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother’s protective pouch until it is three years old.

abilities.name: Scrappy
abilities.description: Lets the Pokémon's normal and fighting moves hit ghost Pokémon.

flavorText.firered: It maintains balance using its tail, which is wound up like a coil. It may spray ink from its mouth.
flavorText.leafgreen: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.description: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

flavorText.firered: Its body bristles with sharp spikes. Carelessly trying to touch it could cause fainting from the spikes.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is capable of swimming backwards by rapidly flapping its winglike pectoral fins and stout tail.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.description: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

flavorText.firered: Its dorsal and pectoral fins are strongly developed like muscles. It can swim at a speed of five knots.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of “The Water Queen.”

flavorText.firered: The horn on its head is sharp like a drill. It bores a hole in a boulder to make its nest.
flavorText.leafgreen: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

flavorText.firered: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.
flavorText.leafgreen: An enigmatic POKéMON that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON has a geometric body. Because of its body, the locals suspect that it is an alien creature.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

encounters.notes: Trade an Abra to NPC outside Diglett's Cave entrance on Route 2

flavorText.firered: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.
flavorText.leafgreen: If interrupted while it is miming, it will suddenly DOUBLESLAP the offender with its broad hands.

abilities.name: Filter
abilities.description: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

flavorText.firered: It tears and shreds prey with its wickedly sharp scythes. It very rarely spreads its wings to fly.
flavorText.leafgreen: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one of itself.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

encounters.notes: Trade a Poliwhirl to NPC in Cerulean City house

flavorText.firered: It speaks using a language that sounds human. Research is under way to determine what is being said.
flavorText.leafgreen: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

abilities.name: Forewarn
abilities.description: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

flavorText.firered: It loves to feed on strong electricity. It occasionally appears around large power plants and so on.
flavorText.leafgreen: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

flavorText.firered: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather’s body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly amidst flames.

flavorText.firered: Its two long pincer horns are powerful. Once they grip an enemy, they won’t release until the foe is torn.
flavorText.leafgreen: If it fails to crush the foe in its pincers, it will swing around and toss the opponent.

abilities.name: Mold Breaker
abilities.description: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.

flavorText.firered: When it is about to TACKLE, it whips its body repeatedly with its three long tails.
flavorText.leafgreen: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

abilities.name: Anger Point
abilities.description: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

flavorText.firered: It is virtually worthless in terms of both power and speed. It is the most weak and pathetic POKéMON in the world.
flavorText.leafgreen: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

flavorText.firered: It has an extremely aggressive nature. The HYPER BEAM it shoots from its mouth totally incinerates all targets.
flavorText.leafgreen: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

encounters.notes: Given by Silph Co. employee on 7F after defeating Giovanni

flavorText.firered: Its high intelligence enables it to understand human speech. It likes to ferry people on its back.
flavorText.leafgreen: A POKéMON that has been overhunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people on its back.

flavorText.firered: It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to transform into other life- forms.
flavorText.leafgreen: Capable of copying an opponent’s genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

encounters.notes: Received from on top floor of Celadon Mansion

flavorText.firered: An extremely rare POKéMON that may evolve in a number of different ways depending on stimuli.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONES.

abilities.name: Adaptability
abilities.description: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.

flavorText.firered: Its body’s cellular structure is similar to the molecular composition of water. It can melt invisibly in water.
flavorText.leafgreen: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.

flavorText.firered: If it is angered or startled, the fur all over its body bristles like sharp needles that pierce foes.
flavorText.leafgreen: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

flavorText.firered: It has a flame bag inside its body. After inhaling deeply, it blows out flames of nearly 3,100 degrees Fahrenheit.
flavorText.leafgreen: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature can soar to over 1,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

encounters.notes: Purchased for 9,999 coins at Celadon Game Corner Prize Corner

flavorText.firered: Using the most advanced technologies, scientists finally succeeded in making the first artificial POKéMON.
flavorText.leafgreen: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. It is capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

abilities.name: Download
abilities.description: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.

encounters.notes: Revived from Dome Fossil at Cinnabar Lab
Pick Dome Fossil on Mt. Moon B2F (exclusive choice vs. Helix)

flavorText.firered: A prehistoric POKéMON that lived in the primordial sea, it swims by twisting its 10 tentacles about.
flavorText.leafgreen: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically regenerated from fossils.

flavorText.firered: Its tentacles are highly developed as if they are hands and feet. As soon as it ensnares prey, it bites.
flavorText.leafgreen: Despite having strong fangs and tentacles, it went extinct when its heavy shell made it unable to catch prey.

encounters.notes: Revived from Helix Fossil at Cinnabar Lab
Pick Helix Fossil on Mt. Moon B2F (exclusive choice vs. Dome)

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON was regenerated from the fossil of an ancient creature. It protects itself with a hard shell.
flavorText.leafgreen: A POKéMON that was regenerated from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor long ago.

flavorText.firered: It swims freely through water. It catches prey with its scythe-like arms and drains the victim’s fluids.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains their fluids.

encounters.notes: Revived from Old Amber at Cinnabar Lab
Receive Old Amber from scientist in Pewter Museum (back room)

flavorText.firered: It was regenerated from a dinosaur’s genetic matter that was found in amber. It flies with high-pitched cries.
flavorText.leafgreen: A ferocious, prehistoric POKéMON that goes for the enemy’s throat with its serrated, sawlike fangs.

flavorText.firered: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.
flavorText.leafgreen: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found in Seafoam Islands B4F; requires Strength & Surf

flavorText.firered: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. With its long tail trailing behind, its flying form is magnificent.
flavorText.leafgreen: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found deep in Power Plant on Route 10; requires Surf

flavorText.firered: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. While it is flying, it makes crackling and snapping sounds.
flavorText.leafgreen: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found at top of Mt. Ember on One Island (post-game)

flavorText.firered: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. Those seeing it are overwhelmed by its orange wings that seem to be on fire.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is said to be the legendary bird POKéMON of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flare of flames.

flavorText.firered: Even the young can exceed 6.5 feet in length. It grows larger by repeatedly shedding skin.
flavorText.leafgreen: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

flavorText.firered: It is said to live in seas and lakes. Even though it has no wings, it has been seen flying occasionally.
flavorText.leafgreen: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. It is said to have the ability to change the weather.

flavorText.firered: It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.
flavorText.leafgreen: Only a very few people ever see this POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

encounters.notes: Lv.70 — found in Cerulean Cave B1F; requires all 8 badges

flavorText.firered: A POKéMON whose genetic code was repeatedly recombined for research. It turned vicious as a result.
flavorText.leafgreen: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA- engineering experiments.

encounters.notes: Obtained via Nintendo Mystery Gift event (no longer available)

flavorText.firered: A POKéMON of South America that was thought to have been extinct. It is very intelligent and learns any move.
flavorText.leafgreen: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

flavorText.firered: It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
flavorText.leafgreen: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

flavorText.firered: There is no telling where its tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunting RATTATA.
flavorText.leafgreen: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.

flavorText.firered: When the weather turns cold, numerous LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: The star patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.
flavorText.leafgreen: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: It spins a web using fine--but durable-- thread. It then waits patiently for prey to be trapped.
flavorText.leafgreen: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: A single strand of a special string is endlessly spun out of its rear. The string leads back to its nest.
flavorText.leafgreen: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.
flavorText.leafgreen: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

flavorText.firered: It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
flavorText.leafgreen: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.

flavorText.firered: It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.
flavorText.leafgreen: Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

flavorText.firered: In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.
flavorText.leafgreen: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

flavorText.firered: Its fleece grows continually. In the summer, the fleece is fully shed, but it grows back in a week.
flavorText.leafgreen: If static electricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

flavorText.firered: Its fluffy fleece easily stores electricity. Its rubbery hide keeps it from being electrocuted.
flavorText.leafgreen: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won’t grow.

flavorText.firered: The bright light on its tail can be seen far away. It has been treasured since ancient times as a beacon.
flavorText.leafgreen: The tail’s tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

flavorText.firered: The end of its tail serves as a buoy that keeps it from drowning, even in a vicious current.
flavorText.leafgreen: The tip of its tail, which contains oil that is lighter than water, lets it swim without drowning.

flavorText.firered: When it plays in water, it rolls up its elongated ears to prevent their insides from getting wet.
flavorText.leafgreen: By keeping still and listening intently, it can even tell what is in wild, fast-moving rivers.

flavorText.firered: Its body is so light, it must grip the ground firmly with its feet to keep from being blown away.
flavorText.leafgreen: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.description: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

flavorText.firered: It spreads its petals to absorb sunlight. It also floats in the air to get closer to the sun.
flavorText.leafgreen: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.description: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

flavorText.firered: It drifts on seasonal winds and spreads its cotton-like spores all over the world to make more offspring.
flavorText.leafgreen: Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.

abilities.name: Leaf Guard
abilities.description: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.

flavorText.firered: It lives atop tall trees. When leaping from branch to branch, it deftly uses its tail for balance.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

flavorText.firered: Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.
flavorText.leafgreen: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.

flavorText.firered: When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.
flavorText.leafgreen: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

flavorText.firered: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on boulders and boat hulls as it swims.
flavorText.leafgreen: This carefree POKéMON has an easygoing nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

flavorText.firered: It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.
flavorText.leafgreen: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

abilities.name: Super Luck
abilities.description: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.

flavorText.firered: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.
flavorText.leafgreen: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

flavorText.firered: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.
flavorText.leafgreen: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

flavorText.firered: To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.
flavorText.leafgreen: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to pump up its counterstrike.

flavorText.firered: It hangs and waits for flying-insect prey to come near. It does not move about much on its own.
flavorText.leafgreen: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The extra weight doesn’t bother it.

flavorText.firered: It remains immovably rooted to its tree. It scatters pieces of its hard shell to drive its enemies away.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its entire body is shielded by a steel- hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.

flavorText.firered: If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can hover just slightly using its wings.
flavorText.leafgreen: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.

flavorText.firered: The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.
flavorText.leafgreen: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

flavorText.firered: It stores BERRIES inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.
flavorText.leafgreen: The BERRIES it stores in its vaselike shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.description: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.

flavorText.firered: Usually docile, but if disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
flavorText.leafgreen: This powerful POKéMON thrusts its prized horn under its enemies’ bellies, then lifts and throws them.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

flavorText.firered: Vicious in nature, it drives PIDGEY from their nests and feasts on the eggs that are left behind.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

flavorText.firered: Before food becomes scarce in wintertime, its habit is to hoard food in many hidden locations.
flavorText.leafgreen: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.description: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

flavorText.firered: With its ability to distinguish any smell, it unfailingly finds all food buried deep underground.
flavorText.leafgreen: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap stout trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.description: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

flavorText.firered: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.
flavorText.leafgreen: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.

flavorText.firered: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.
flavorText.leafgreen: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

flavorText.firered: If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
flavorText.leafgreen: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

abilities.name: Snow Cloak
abilities.description: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail.  Protects against hail damage.

flavorText.firered: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.
flavorText.leafgreen: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

abilities.name: Snow Cloak
abilities.description: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail.  Protects against hail damage.

flavorText.firered: Using its dorsal fin as a suction pad, it clings to a MANTINE’s underside to scavenge for leftovers.
flavorText.leafgreen: It has superb accuracy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 100 yards.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.description: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

flavorText.firered: It instinctively sneaks into rocky holes. If it gets sleepy, it steals the nest of a fellow OCTILLERY.
flavorText.leafgreen: It traps enemies with its suction-cupped tentacles, then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

abilities.name: Sniper
abilities.description: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

flavorText.firered: It nests at the edge of sharp cliffs. It spends all day carrying food to its awaiting chicks.
flavorText.leafgreen: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

flavorText.firered: Swimming freely in open seas, it may fly out of the water and over the waves if it builds up enough speed.
flavorText.leafgreen: As it majestically swims, it doesn’t care if REMORAID attach to it to scavenge for its leftovers.

flavorText.firered: After nesting in bramble bushes, the wings of its chicks grow hard from scratches by thorns.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but its bones are hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

flavorText.firered: To corner prey, they check each other’s location using barks that only they can understand.
flavorText.leafgreen: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing prey.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: Upon hearing its eerie howls, other POKéMON get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.
flavorText.leafgreen: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

flavorText.firered: As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.
flavorText.leafgreen: It swings its long snout around playfully, but because it is so strong, this can be dangerous.

flavorText.firered: The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take a long time to grow.
flavorText.leafgreen: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.

flavorText.firered: Those who stare at its antlers will gradually lose control of their senses and be unable to stand.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where reality is distorted.

abilities.name: Frisk
abilities.description: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

flavorText.firered: Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.
flavorText.leafgreen: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON races across the land while barking a cry that sounds like crashing thunder.
flavorText.leafgreen: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

flavorText.firered: A POKéMON that races across the land. It is said that one is born every time a new volcano appears.
flavorText.leafgreen: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Unable to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

flavorText.firered: This POKéMON races across the land. It is said that north winds will somehow blow whenever it appears.
flavorText.leafgreen: Said to be the reincarnation of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

flavorText.firered: It is born deep underground. It can’t emerge until it has entirely consumed the soil around it.
flavorText.leafgreen: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.

flavorText.firered: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.

flavorText.firered: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
flavorText.leafgreen: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

flavorText.firered: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.
flavorText.leafgreen: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

flavorText.firered: A legend says that its body glows in seven colors. A rainbow is said to form behind it when it flies.
flavorText.leafgreen: Legends claim this POKéMON flies the world’s skies continuously on its magnificent seven-colored wings.

flavorText.firered: When CELEBI disappears deep in a forest, it is said to leave behind an egg it brought from the future.
flavorText.leafgreen: This POKéMON wanders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.

flavorText.firered: This DEOXYS has transformed into its aggressive guise. It can fool enemies by altering its appearance.
flavorText.leafgreen: When it changes form, an aurora appears. It absorbs attacks by altering its cellular structure.
